sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vector (id INT, group_elem INT);
SELECT gvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT group_elem FROM test_vector WHERE id = 1), 2, 0, TRUE);
UPDATE test_vector SET group_elem = 1 WHERE id = 2 AND group_elem = 4;
SELECT gvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT group_elem FROM test_vector), 3, 1, FALSE);
